examples: The beige of his jacket toned (in) with the cream shirt.
The sun on the bright, beige countryside was painful.
Maybe we'll finally abandon those beige computer cases.
The mushroom hunter's year begins with morels (Morchella esculenta), beige or charcoal and honeycombed with crevices.
When Vice was filming, producers noticed the decaying Art Deco buildings, and also their bland, beige colours.
